---
title: "midterm-1"
format: html
editor: 
  mode: source
---

Midterm Exam 1 will take place on **Thursday October 9** during your lab section. There will be XX
problems, and they will break down as follows:

0. 
1.
2.

Below are practice problems for each of these areas, as well as guidance about what course materials to refer to if you want more review on a particular topic.

# Probability spaces

# Counting

# Conditional probability 

# Discrete random variables
